creator: js@jschneider.com
text:
fusefs-encfs was installed from my own poudriere builder.  Bundled TinyXML was enabled (default) in all builds.  I just disabled, rebuilt and reinstalled fusefs-encfs.  Unfortunately, I'm still not seeing any files in the mounted directories.

I will try to upgrade to latest 11.1-STABLE as well as install package from FreeBSD public repository.
